'''鈭歵h-t-p''' ('''kathatap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:licence|licence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:licence|licence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| kathatap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatap|thithatap]] || [[word:jithatap|jithatap]] || [[word:shithatap|shithatap]] || [[word:kithatap|kithatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatap|thuthuthatap]] || [[word:jujuthatap|jujuthatap]] || [[word:shushuthatap|shushuthatap]] || [[word:kukuthatap|kukuthatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatap|thuthatap]] || [[word:juthatap|juthatap]] || [[word:shuthatap|shuthatap]] || [[word:kuthatap|kuthatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatap|thuthatap]] || [[word:juthatap|juthatap]] || [[word:shuthatap|shuthatap]] || [[word:kuthatap|kuthatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatap|thethatap]] || [[word:jethatap|jethatap]] || [[word:shethatap|shethatap]] || [[word:kethatap|kethatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatap|thothothatap]] || [[word:jojothatap|jojothatap]] || [[word:shoshothatap|shoshothatap]] || [[word:kokothatap|kokothatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatap|thothatap]] || [[word:jothatap|jothatap]] || [[word:shothatap|shothatap]] || [[word:kothatap|kothatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatap|thothatap]] || [[word:jothatap|jothatap]] || [[word:shothatap|shothatap]] || [[word:kothatap|kothatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thatap|th忙thatap]] || [[word:j忙thatap|j忙thatap]] || [[word:sh忙thatap|sh忙thatap]] || [[word:k忙thatap|k忙thatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatap|thathathatap]] || [[word:jajathatap|jajathatap]] || [[word:shashathatap|shashathatap]] || [[word:kakathatap|kakathatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatap|thathatap]] || [[word:jathatap|jathatap]] || [[word:shathatap|shathatap]] || [[word:kathatap|kathatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatap|thathatap]] || [[word:jathatap|jathatap]] || [[word:shathatap|shathatap]] || [[word:kathatap|kathatap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathatap|shathatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathatap|goshathatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathatap|gokishathatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathatapn眉|shathatapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathatapnkn眉|goshathatapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathatapn眉|gokishathatapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathatapsh毛|shathatapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathatapnksh毛|goshathatapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathatapsh毛|gokishathatapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathatapro|shathatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathatapnkro|goshathatapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathatapro|gokishathatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatapmu|shathatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathatapnkmu|goshathatapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathatapmu|gokishathatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathatapsher|shathatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathatapnksher|goshathatapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathatapsher|gokishathatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathatapng|shathatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathatapnkng|goshathatapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathatapng|gokishathatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathatapya|shathatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathatapnkya|goshathatapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathatapya|gokishathatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathatapyam|shathatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathatapnkyam|goshathatapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathatapyam|gokishathatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathatapn眉sh毛|shathatapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathatapnkn眉sh毛|goshathatapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathatapn眉sh毛|gokishathatapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathatapn眉ro|shathatapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathatapnkn眉ro|goshathatapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathatapn眉ro|gokishathatapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatapn眉mu|shathatapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathatapnkn眉mu|goshathatapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathatapn眉mu|gokishathatapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathatapsh毛n眉|shathatapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathatapnksh毛n眉|goshathatapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathatapsh毛n眉|gokishathatapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathatapsh毛ro|shathatapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathatapnksh毛ro|goshathatapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathatapsh毛ro|gokishathatapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatapsh毛mu|shathatapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathatapnksh毛mu|goshathatapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathatapsh毛mu|gokishathatapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathatapron眉|shathatapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathatapnkron眉|goshathatapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathatapron眉|gokishathatapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathataprosh毛|shathataprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathatapnkrosh毛|goshathatapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathataprosh毛|gokishathataprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatapromu|shathatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathatapnkromu|goshathatapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathatapromu|gokishathatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathatapmun眉|shathatapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathatapnkmun眉|goshathatapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathatapmun眉|gokishathatapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathatapmush毛|shathatapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathatapnkmush毛|goshathatapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathatapmush毛|gokishathatapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathatapmuro|shathatapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathatapnkmuro|goshathatapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathatapmuro|gokishathatapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
